properties.displayName: Enforce Web App Update ftp state to use ftps_only or disabled
nonComplianceMessages: The WebApp's FTP setting does not meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: Enforce Web App ftp state to use ftps_only or disabled. If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
